INSTRUCTIONS: Copy the object below and add it to the 'skills' array in ~/.penpot-ai-kit/skills.json

entry.name: penpot-wcag22
entry.description: WCAG 2.2 Level AA audit resource: contrast ratios, target sizes, focus indicators, and the 6 new 2.2 criteria. Grounds penpot-audit-accessibility in exact numeric thresholds.
